description.overview: The Flat-Coated Retriever is the Peter Pan of retrievers—they never seem to grow up. These cheerful, optimistic dogs maintain their puppy-like enthusiasm well into adulthood.
description.history: The Flat-Coated Retriever originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being cheerful, optimistic, friendly.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their flat, dense, medium-length coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The Flat-Coated Retriever is the Peter Pan of retrievers—they never seem to grow up. These cheerful, optimistic dogs maintain their puppy-like enthusiasm well into adulthood.
